events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a field review of structural bolting at the rough-complete stage. The description says: expected unit in intended location, nameplates and orientation marks readable, housing and adjacent work show no damage, item matches referenced detail for this stage. Reference material: RCSC Specification.

This sounds like everything is in order - no defects, no damage, matches the detail. So decision should be "pass", risk low, component_conditions empty list, percent_complete maybe around 85-90 for rough-complete stage.

Let me write the JSON.
